sections.draft_text: The Supplier's Quotation is to include pricing on the basis of Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), Combination of T&M and Fixed Price, or Other. Complete the pricing schedule as specified in the tender. Reference annexes where required.

Quotations are to include a PDF copy of the Supplier’s Deed of Undertaking in the form attached duly signed by the Supplier. State acceptance of, or proposed deviations from, the draft contract terms.

The Supplier must deliver the following Plans: Australian Industry Capability (AIC) Plan in accordance with Annexure G to this SOW; Transition-In Plan prepared in accordance with Annexure H to this SOW; Phase-Out Plan prepared in accordance with Annexure I to this SOW; Supplier Risk Management Plan in accordance with Annexure J to this SOW; Service Management Plan in accordance with Annexure L to this SOW; Disaster Recovery Plan in accordance with Annexure N to this SOW; Test Plan in accordance with Annexure P to this SOW. Describe the approach to transition-in and, if applicable, transition-out.

The Commonwealth’s security arrangements impacting the Services are: Sustainment of eTools and DDM must be undertaken from a Physical Zone 3 (as certified under the DSPF) or higher site. Describe the security framework, controls, and certifications relevant to this engagement.
The Supplier will provide Key Persons for the following Key Positions. List proposed key personnel with roles, qualifications, and relevant experience.

The Supplier agrees and acknowledges that the Commonwealth will inform the Supplier, as soon as practicable after each Performance Review, of the Supplier’s Achieved Performance for each KPI for the relevant Review Period and whether the Supplier is required to undertake any course of action in relation to its performance. Describe the service management framework, including ITSM processes, SLAs, and escalation paths.
